target.title: docs: improve plugin inventory layout
target.body:
## Summary
- Change the generated plugin inventory from a four-column Markdown table to a two-column Markdown table so long package and surface values wrap within each entry instead of forcing global column widths.
- Keep the plugin reference landing page generated, but stop duplicating the full inventory there; it now points readers to the inventory while per-plugin generated reference pages remain intact.
- Regenerate the stale Parallel plugin reference page and glossary entries because the existing generator sees `extensions/parallel` and links it to the Parallel search docs.

## User Intent
Josh reported that the plugin inventory table was unreadable on normal docs screens and asked for a KISS, convention-aligned, merge-ready PR with before/after visual proof. The final change avoids custom table CSS and bespoke HTML layouts, removes AI/frontmatter disclosure churn from the docs output, and keeps the existing generated-doc conventions intact.

## Visual Proof
Proof uses the current `openclaw/docs` static renderer, not the obsolete Mintlify preview. I built `origin/main` as before and this PR as after through the real docs shell, then captured the plugin inventory table at three viewport widths.

| Width | Before | After |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 390px | ![Before 390px](https://tmpfiles.org/dl/wbwDKcnwFSgl/renderer-before-mobile-390.png) | ![After 390px](https://tmpfiles.org/dl/wowMK5nBFDcH/renderer-after-mobile-390.png) |
| 768px | ![Before 768px](https://tmpfiles.org/dl/wGw1KXn7FA6y/renderer-before-tablet-768.png) | ![After 768px](https://tmpfiles.org/dl/wOwDKjneFwMk/renderer-after-tablet-768.png) |
| 1120px | ![Before 1120px](https://tmpfiles.org/dl/w2wQKQntFBKK/renderer-before-desktop-1120.png) | ![After 1120px](https://tmpfiles.org/dl/wxw2KYnhFXUM/renderer-after-desktop-1120.png) |

Browser plugin note: I used the in-app Browser and its viewport capability while validating this, but after a Browser route reset it blocked loopback, Cloudflare tunnel, and file-host after-build URLs with `ERR_BLOCKED_BY_CLIENT`. The committed visual proof above is therefore from the same Playwright-based renderer path used by `openclaw/docs` visual checks. The production before page was also inspected in the in-app Browser.

## Verification
- `node scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs --check`
- `node scripts/check-docs-i18n-glossary.mjs --base origin/main`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs`
- `node scripts/docs-link-audit.mjs`
- `git diff --check`
- `nix shell nixpkgs#oxfmt --command oxfmt --check scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs docs/plugins/plugin-inventory.md docs/plugins/reference.md docs/plugins/reference/parallel.md`
- `nix shell nixpkgs#pnpm --command pnpm dlx --config.resolution-mode=highest markdownlint-cli2 --config config/markdownlint-cli2.jsonc docs/plugins/plugin-inventory.md docs/plugins/reference.md docs/plugins/reference/parallel.md`
- `openclaw/docs`: `npm ci`, sync before/after docs, `npm run docs:build:shell`, `npm run docs:smoke:shell`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

Note: repo-local `node_modules/oxfmt` is blocked in this Codex process by macOS Team ID signing; the Nix `oxfmt` proof above passes on the touched files.
target.author: joshp123
